summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 37 features: Bug fixes (lesson unlock via 'I Attended', optional recording URL), P2 Chat features (reactions, read receipts), P3 QR code on Teacher Dashboard, and P1 Offline mode. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful
Backend: First lesson (order 0 or 1) is always unlocked
Backend: Marking 'marked_attended' creates lesson_completion record (unlocks next lesson)
Backend: Lesson can be created without recording_url (optional field)
Backend: Lesson can be created with recording_url
Backend: GET /api/chat returns messages with reactions array
Backend: POST /api/chat/{id}/react?emoji=👍 toggles reactions (add/remove)
Backend: GET /api/chat/{id}/reactions returns grouped reactions with count, users, user_reacted
Backend: POST /api/chat/mark-read records user's read time
Backend: GET /api/chat/read-receipts returns all readers with last_read_at
Backend: Guests cannot add reactions (403 Forbidden)
Backend: Guests cannot mark chat as read (403 Forbidden)
Frontend: Chat page loads with 15 messages and reaction buttons
Frontend: WebSocket status shows 'Live' when connected
Frontend: Hovering on message shows action bar with smiley icon
Frontend: Clicking smiley icon opens reaction picker with 6 emojis (👍, ❤️, 😂, 🙏, 🔥, 👏)
Frontend: Clicking emoji adds reaction badge to message
Frontend: Reaction badges show count and highlight when user has reacted
Frontend: Teacher Dashboard loads with Share Invite card
Frontend: QR code section displays QRCodeSVG with invite URL
Frontend: 'Save QR' download button present
Frontend: Invite code 'DEMO2026' displayed
Frontend: Copy Code, Copy Link, Send Email, Copy Template buttons all present
Frontend: LessonWizard shows 'YouTube URL (optional)' label
Frontend: Can proceed through wizard without filling recording URL
Frontend: Offline banner not visible when online (correct behavior)
Frontend: Service Worker API available
Frontend: First lesson shows checkmark (completed) and no lock icon
critical_code_review_comments: attendance.py lines 39-52: Correctly creates lesson_completion when action='marked_attended' - bug fix verified
lessons.py line 55-56: First lesson (order <= 1) is always unlocked - bug fix verified
social.py lines 142-165: Chat reaction toggle endpoint works correctly with add/remove logic
social.py lines 185-201: Read receipts endpoints (mark-read, get-receipts) implemented correctly
ChatWidgets.jsx: Clean extraction of ChatReactions, ChatActionBar, ReadReceipts components
Chat.jsx: Optimistic reaction updates with proper rollback on error
TeacherDashboard.jsx lines 223-259: QR code section with QRCodeSVG and download functionality
LessonWizard.jsx lines 57-60: Recording URL validation removed, canProceed() returns true for youtube/external
LessonWizard.jsx line 300: Label shows '(optional)' for recording URL
Layout.jsx lines 57-92: Offline detection with navigator.onLine and window events
Layout.jsx lines 326-333: Offline banner with WifiOff icon and amber styling
sw.js: Comprehensive service worker with IndexedDB queue, background sync, cache-first for static assets
seed_data_creation: Test chat messages created and cleaned up during reaction tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 37 features fully tested and working: 1) Lesson unlock bug fixed - marking 'I Attended' creates lesson_completion, 2) Recording URL is optional in LessonWizard, 3) Chat reactions work with toggle behavior and emoji picker, 4) Chat read receipts show 'Seen by...' text, 5) QR code on Teacher Dashboard with Save QR download, 6) Offline banner and Service Worker caching implemented. No issues found.

bug_fix_lesson_unlock.details: attendance.py creates lesson_completion when action='marked_attended', lessons.py unlocks first lesson (order <= 1)

bug_fix_recording_url_optional.details: LessonWizard shows '(optional)' label and allows proceeding without URL

p2_chat_reactions.details: Toggle endpoint, reaction picker with 6 emojis, reaction badges with count

p2_chat_read_receipts.details: mark-read and read-receipts endpoints, ReadReceipts component shows 'Seen by...'

p3_qr_code_teacher_dashboard.details: QRCodeSVG renders invite URL, Save QR button downloads PNG

p1_offline_mode.details: Service Worker with IndexedDB queue, offline banner with WifiOff icon, cache warming
